title: Top 50 Instagram Accounts by Followers (2026)
subtitle: Ranked list of the top 50 most followed Instagram accounts with usernames
description:
Top 50 Instagram accounts ranked by followers as of early April 2026. This one only has rank, display name, and username - Instagram locked down their public API pretty hard so detailed stats like exact follower counts and post numbers aren't easily available anymore.

Still useful for ranking charts, cross-platform comparisons (a lot of these names show up in the YouTube and TikTok lists too), or as a lookup table if you're building a multi-platform dashboard.

Heads up: rank 26 is LeBron James but his display name shows as a crown emoji - that's his actual Instagram display name, not a data error.

resources.description: Top 50 Instagram accounts ranked by followers with usernames
